notes:
## What's new

- The sign-in screen got a fresh new look.
- When you log out, your email and password no longer stay filled in.
- Added a small x in the search box so you can clear it with one click.
- The Settings page lines up neatly now.
- Tidied up the buttons in the top corner of the window.
- Swapped the old code box for a quick Activity shortcut up top.
